message:
refactor(ui): pass ExtensionManager to create_provider, decouple theme
from rich_rust, add legacy INI theme loader, add Claude Sonnet 4

Propagate extension-aware provider creation and clean up theme handling
across the UI layer:

src/interactive.rs:
- Pass self.extensions.as_ref() to create_provider() calls
- Add set_label() async method to InteractiveExtensionSession
- Formatting improvements for long method chains

src/tui.rs:
- Switch from rich_rust::Theme to crate::theme::Theme
- Simplify PiConsole builder to no longer apply theme directly

src/rpc.rs:
- Rename resolve_model_api_key -> resolve_model_key throughout
- Pass guard.extensions.as_ref() to create_provider() calls
- Refactor set_model handler to use let-else pattern

src/app.rs:
- Trim trailing \r\n from piped stdin content
- Return early if trimmed stdin is empty (avoid sending blank messages)

src/resources.rs:
- Switch theme loading to dispatch by file extension:
  .json -> Theme::load(), .ini/.theme -> load_legacy_ini_theme()
- Add load_legacy_ini_theme() parser that extracts first hex color
  as accent from INI-style theme files
- Add "json" to is_theme_file() extension list

src/models.rs:
- Add "claude-sonnet-4-20250514" (Claude Sonnet 4) to built-in models
- Formatting fix for find_by_id chain

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
